title: Luffy Protects the Princess
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Narrator, Luffy, Jinbe. The core story beat is luffy protects the princess.
scene: The scene centers on luffy protects the princess, with Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Narrator, Luffy, Jinbe driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Thank goodness!!! You have saved us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oww wwwwwwwwwww...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm out of... breath...!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You must not turn back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn that hordy... I thought he was out for the count?!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Find the Princess!!! Bring them here!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: What are you hanging about for?!!! OBEY YOUR KING'S ORDERS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Y... Yes, sir!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My apologies... to you all......!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I will not...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Glurm Phgll...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...ALLOW YOU TO DIE HERE...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's this...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who knows...? Looks like some dead man's ske- leton...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ocean forest

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa!! This place looks pretty cool!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Uwaaah!!! Thank you so much, Luffy-sama...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have always... always wanted to come here...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hyah hahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Maybe we'll be able to rest and heal you up here...?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: AHH!! It's the sunny!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Heyy, frankly yyy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is this where you've been this whole time....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OUUUUUWWWW!! is that... Luffy?!! Hmmmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, hot damn! That's quite the pinup- girl you've brought with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll introduce you! This is crybaby!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Crybaby, huh?! I see! You'd better get your act together, lady!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: My - yes... my apologies... my name is Shirahoshii.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Robin showed up here a while back, too. Says she's looking for something.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She went off into that big coral forest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy-KUN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I barely recognised you!! It has been quite some time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: JIMBEI?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! It's really you!! They told me you weren't here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought I wasn't gonna be able to see you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's this? Then, you didn't come here because you got my message?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Boss jimbei- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Ah, Princess Shirahoshii... I did not expect to see you here. It is a pleasu...

summary: Luffy Protects the Princess. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
